case_title: CRUZ EDUARDO VS KARAH MOHAMED A

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $600.00 FILED BY CRUZ EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT KARAH MOHAMED A ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KARAH MOHAMED A

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRUZ EDUARDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KARAH MOHAMED A $400.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $400.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT KARAH MOHAMED A HEARING SET FOR JUL-05-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-05-1991, GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-31-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-09-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT KARAH MOHAMED A STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
